editor.subtitle: Subtitle

editor.maxSelectionsTooHigh: Max selections cannot exceed number of options (currently {{count}}).
editor.optionsHelper: Configure the answer choices for this question. You can change labels, add descriptions, images and reorder options at any time.
editor.optionApiCodeHint: Used when this question sends API codes in the webhook.
editor.webhookBlockHint: One top-level key in results_payload for this question. For choice questions, set option value codes on each row below. For a text-input step, answers are sent under this key (one string, or an object mapping field ids to values when there are multiple fields).
editor.selectTextFieldsHint: Optional fields respondents fill in before choosing an option (e.g. email or notes). Each field can have a hint below the input.

settingsPage.exitStudioSetupAria: Close workspace settings and return to the app
settingsPage.notificationMode: How would you like to be notified?

settingsPage.notificationCategoriesHint: Real-time and digest mode include all categories below. CRM-wide notifications backend lands in a later phase.
settingsPage.apiKeyDescription: Optional keys for enrichment and AI. Today the app reads them only from server environment variables (e.g. Vercel or Supabase secrets, or .env.local in development). Values are never sent to the browser.
settingsPage.apiKeyEnvHowTo: Set APOLLO_API_KEY, PHANTOMBUSTER_API_KEY, BROWSE_AI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY on your deployment host, then redeploy or restart the dev server. Status below shows whether each variable is non-empty on the server — not the secret itself.

settingsPage.apiKeysForbidden: Only founder, ops, and admin can view API key status.

settingsPage.exportReady: Your data export is ready to download.
settingsPage.consentLogDesc: History of consents you have given on this platform.

settingsPage.deleteWorkspaceConfirmName: Type the workspace name to confirm:
settingsPage.deleteWorkspaceHint: After you confirm, this workspace and its data are removed from our production systems immediately. Statutory retention (e.g. tax-related records) may still apply. Backup copies expire under our normal rotation and are not used for routine processing.
settingsPage.changePasswordHint: Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a number—the same rules as when you signed up. Your new password is saved to your Supabase account immediately.
settingsPage.connectedAccountsEmpty: No connected accounts. Google OAuth will be available after login setup.

integration.title: External integration (API)
integration.subtitle: Server-to-server API keys, webhooks, and custom field mapping for results_payload. Not shown to respondents.
integration.devPanelSubtitle: Map answers to JSON keys for your webhook.
integration.devWorkspaceCallout: Keys and webhook URL: Settings → API keys (bottom of that page).
integration.devEnableHint: Requires webhook URL in workspace settings.
integration.embedWorkspaceSectionIntro: One place for all surveys in this workspace.
integration.embedWorkspaceDevTabHint: Per-survey field names: builder → Dev tab.
integration.workspaceWebhookHint: We POST a signed payload here when an embedded or widget session completes. HTTPS only.
integration.enableHint: When enabled, configure keys, webhook URL, and payload field rules below.
integration.workspaceKeysShort: Bearer token for POST /api/v1/sessions from your backend. Each secret is shown only once when created.
integration.workspaceKeysHint: Use the key as Bearer token for POST /api/v1/sessions from your backend. Keys are shown only once when created.
integration.workspaceKeysBearerHint: Paste the entire key (starts with psk_) as the Bearer token. If your client adds "Bearer" automatically, do not add it again. URL must be exactly /api/v1/sessions (watch for typos). 401 means the token format is wrong or the key was revoked/expired.
integration.workspaceKeysEmpty: No API keys yet. Create one to authenticate server-side session requests.
integration.newKeyBannerHint: You will not be able to see it again. Store it in a secret manager.
integration.secretLeaveBlank: Leave blank to keep the current secret.
integration.payloadEmpty: Add keys the same way your backend expects them in results_payload.
integration.devMappingOneLiner: JSON key → question → value format (labels, ids, or API codes from the step).
integration.devMappingEditorHint: Set JSON property names on each select, multiselect, or scale in the builder. Legacy rules from the database still apply until removed.
integration.payloadPreviewHint: Property names and value types after merge (builder + any legacy Dev rules). Not a live response.
integration.payloadPreviewEmpty: No mapped properties yet. Add a JSON property name on a question in the center editor.
integration.ruleCardExplainShort: One property in the webhook JSON.
integration.multiselectValueHint: One JSON field; value is the full answer (often an array).
integration.legacyMapHint: This rule used an old per-option table. Pick a mode to replace it.
integration.exportScaleHint: We send the numeric scale value the respondent chose.
integration.contactNoFields: Enable at least one field on the Contact step in the builder.
integration.exportRawJsonHint: We send the raw stored answer (JSON). Useful for advanced cases.
integration.noSteps: Add steps to the survey first, then map fields here.
integration.saveValidationError: Fix the highlighted field rules and try again.
integration.optionMapJson: Option id to external value (JSON object)

legal.todoPlaceholder: [TODO: To be filled by legal counsel]
legal.privacyDataSubjectRights: Data subject rights (access, rectification, erasure, portability, objection)
legal.termsServiceDescriptionText: 2mb CRM is an internal customer relationship management tool used by 2MB. Access is restricted to invited employees. The service is operated by 2MB GmbH, [Street Address], [Postal Code] [City], Germany.
legal.termsRegistrationText: Each natural person may register one account. Account creation requires a valid email address. Upon registration, a workspace is automatically created for the user. The user is solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality and security of their account credentials. Users must be at least 18 years of age or have the consent of a legal guardian to use the platform. [Company Name] reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts created with false or misleading information.
legal.termsPlansPaymentText: 2mb CRM is provided as an internal and studio-facing sales operations tool. Commercial terms, if any, are agreed separately in writing between your organization and 2mb. There is no self-serve paid subscription inside the product today.
legal.termsContentLiabilityText: Users bear full responsibility for all survey content they create, publish, and distribute through the platform. [Company Name] acts as a data processor (Auftragsverarbeiter) and not as a data controller with respect to respondent data collected through user-created surveys. Users must ensure that their surveys comply with all applicable laws, including the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). [Company Name] reserves the right to remove or disable access to content that violates these Terms of Service or applicable law, without prior notice.
legal.termsLimitationOfLiabilityText: The liability of [Company Name] is limited to cases of intent and gross negligence (Vorsatz und grobe Fahrlässigkeit) in accordance with German law. [Company Name] shall not be liable for indirect damages, consequential damages, or lost profits. Liability caps follow applicable law and any separate written agreement with your organization. [Company Name] shall not be liable for service interruptions caused by force majeure, including but not limited to natural disasters, war, government action, or infrastructure failures beyond its reasonable control. The service is provided "as is" without any warranty of availability, performance, or fitness for a particular purpose.
legal.termsTerminationText: Either party may terminate the agreement with thirty (30) days' written notice. [Company Name] reserves the right to terminate the agreement immediately and without prior notice in the event of a material breach of these Terms by the user. Upon termination, the user may export their data within thirty (30) days. After this period, all data associated with the account — including surveys, responses, uploaded files, and subscription information — will be permanently and irreversibly deleted. This clause governs contractual termination of the service and is separate from requests to erase personal data under Art. 17 GDPR, which are handled as described in our Privacy Policy.
legal.termsGoverningLawText: These Terms of Service are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Federal Republic of Germany (Recht der Bundesrepublik Deutschland), excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods (CISG). Exclusive place of jurisdiction for all disputes arising from or in connection with these Terms is [City], Germany. The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr. We are neither obligated nor willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board. If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall remain in full force and effect.
legal.privacyDataControllerText:
The data controller within the meaning of the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) is:

[Company Name]
[Street Address]
[Postal Code] [City]
Germany

Email: [email@example.com]

For all inquiries related to data protection, please contact our Data Protection Officer (DPO) at [dpo@example.com].
legal.privacyDataCollectedText:
We collect and process the following categories of personal data:

Account data: email address, display name, password (stored as a cryptographic hash only).

Survey data: survey configuration, stages, steps, branding settings, scoring rules.

Respondent data: survey answers, email address (if provided by the respondent), consent records, timestamps.

Technical data: IP address (anonymized within 24 hours), browser type and version, device information, access timestamps, referrer URL.

Payments: in-product subscriptions are not offered today. Any commercial billing between your organization and 2mb is agreed outside this application.
legal.privacyLegalBasisText:
We process personal data on the following legal bases:

Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR — Consent: for analytics cookies (Umami), error monitoring (Sentry), and any future marketing communications. You may withdraw your consent at any time.

Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR — Performance of a contract: for providing account management, survey creation, response collection, and all core platform functionality.

Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR — Legitimate interest: for security measures, fraud prevention, service improvement, and ensuring platform stability. Our legitimate interest does not override your fundamental rights.

Art. 28 GDPR — Data Processing Agreement: for the processing of respondent data, where the survey creator is the data controller and [Company Name] acts as the data processor.
legal.privacyRetentionPeriodText:
Account and workspace data: retained while your account is active. If you delete your account or a workspace in the app, we remove associated personal data from our production systems without undue delay, subject to statutory retention obligations (including payment records below).

Data subject requests: if you contact us to exercise your GDPR rights, we will inform you of the measures taken without undue delay and in any event within one calendar month of receipt (Art. 12(3) GDPR). Where a request is complex or you submit multiple requests, we may extend that period by up to two further months as permitted by law and will notify you within the first month with reasons.

Backups: personal data may remain in encrypted backups until those backups expire under our rotation schedule. Such copies are put beyond routine use, are not used for active processing, and are only restored for disaster recovery; if a restore brings back data that should have been erased, we re-apply the erasure.

Survey data: retained until deleted by the survey owner or until account deletion, whichever occurs first.

Respondent data: retained until deleted by the survey owner or until account deletion.

Server logs: automatically purged after 90 days.

Payment records: retained for 10 years as required by German tax law (§ 147 Abgabenordnung, AO).
legal.privacyDataSubjectRightsText:
Under Articles 15–22 of the GDPR, you have the following rights:

Right of access (Art. 15): You may request confirmation of whether we process your personal data and obtain a copy of that data.

Right to rectification (Art. 16): You may request correction of inaccurate personal data.

Right to erasure (Art. 17): You may request deletion of your personal data ("right to be forgotten"), subject to legal retention obligations.

Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18): You may request that we restrict the processing of your data under certain conditions.

Right to data portability (Art. 20): You may request your personal data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format.

Right to object (Art. 21): You may object to the processing of your data based on legitimate interest at any time.

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at [email@example.com]. We will respond without undue delay and in any event within one calendar month of receipt (Art. 12(3) GDPR); where permitted, we may extend that period by up to two further months for complex or multiple requests and will notify you within the first month with reasons. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority (Aufsichtsbehörde), in particular in the EU member state of your habitual residence, place of work, or the place of the alleged infringement.
legal.privacySubProcessorsText: We use the following sub-processors to provide our services. All sub-processors with EU locations process data within the European Economic Area (EEA). For processors located outside the EEA, appropriate safeguards are in place, including Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission.
legal.privacyDpoContactText:
For all data protection inquiries, please contact our Data Protection Officer:

Email: [dpo@example.com]

Postal address:
[Company Name]
[Street Address]
[Postal Code] [City]
Germany
legal.cookieWhatCookiesText: 2MB CRM is an internal tool with closed registration. We only store data needed to keep you signed in and to remember your UI preferences. There are no analytics, advertising, or third-party tracking cookies, so no consent banner is required.
legal.cookieManageConsentText: You can clear all locally stored data at any time by signing out — this removes UI preferences and the local companies cache. Auth cookies expire automatically when your Supabase session ends.
legal.cookieTableRow1Purpose: Supabase authentication session (access and refresh tokens).
legal.cookieTableRow2Purpose: UI preferences (sidebar collapsed, theme mode) for the signed-in user. localStorage.
legal.cookieTableRow3Purpose: Selected interface language (DE / EN / RU). localStorage.
legal.cookieTableRow4Purpose: Cached company filters and view mode (Kanban / list). localStorage.
legal.dpaSubjectDurationText: This Data Processing Agreement (Auftragsverarbeitungsvertrag, AVV) governs the processing of personal data by 2MB GmbH ("Processor") in accordance with Article 28 GDPR for the operation of the internal 2mb CRM. The subject matter is the processing of company, account, and contact data captured through the CRM. Processing continues for the lifetime of the agreement and ends when all associated data is deleted.
legal.dpaScopeProcessingText:
Types of personal data processed: respondent email addresses, names, phone numbers (if collected by the survey), survey answers, consent records, IP addresses (anonymized), and timestamps.

Categories of data subjects: survey respondents who voluntarily participate in surveys created by the Controller.

Nature and purpose of processing: collection, storage, analysis, and display of survey responses; email notification delivery; result calculation and visualization.
legal.dpaRightsObligationsText:
The Processor shall:

(a) Process personal data only on documented instructions from the Controller (Art. 28(3)(a) GDPR).
(b) Ensure that authorized personnel have committed to confidentiality (Art. 28(3)(b) GDPR).
(c) Implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to ensure a level of security appropriate to the risk (Art. 28(3)(c) GDPR).
(d) Assist the Controller in fulfilling data subject requests (Art. 28(3)(e) GDPR).
(e) Delete or return all personal data upon termination of the contract (Art. 28(3)(g) GDPR).
(f) Make available all information necessary to demonstrate compliance with the obligations laid down in Art. 28 GDPR (Art. 28(3)(h) GDPR).

The Controller shall:

(a) Ensure a lawful basis exists for the collection and processing of respondent data.
(b) Provide clear and transparent privacy notices to survey respondents.
(c) Respond to data subject requests within the statutory timeframes established by the GDPR.
legal.dpaTechnicalMeasuresText:
Technical and organizational measures (TOMs) pursuant to Art. 32 GDPR:

Encryption: All data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). All database connections use SSL.

Access Control: Role-based access control (RBAC) with principle of least privilege. Multi-factor authentication required for administrative access.

Availability: Automated daily backups with geo-redundant storage. Infrastructure providers maintain a 99.9% uptime SLA.

Monitoring: Continuous security monitoring via Sentry. Automated vulnerability scanning. Documented incident response procedures with 72-hour breach notification as required by Art. 33 GDPR.

Data Separation: Strict tenant isolation via workspace-scoped Row Level Security (RLS) in PostgreSQL. No cross-tenant data access is possible at the database level.
legal.dpaSubProcessorSupabasePurpose: Database, authentication, file storage, serverless functions
legal.dpaSubProcessorCloudflarePurpose: DNS, CDN, DDoS protection, Web Application Firewall
legal.dpaSubProcessorSentryPurpose: Error monitoring and performance tracking (no PII)
legal.dpaSubProcessorUmamiPurpose: Privacy-focused website analytics (no cookies, no PII)
legal.dpaSubProcessorVercelPurpose: Frontend hosting, serverless edge functions, CDN
legal.dpaSubProcessorElevenLabsPurpose: AI voice generation (premium feature, opt-in only)
legal.dpaSubProcessorHeyGenPurpose: AI video avatar generation (premium feature, opt-in only)

brandKit.generalTabHint: Logos, colours, fonts, and social links live in
brandKit.generalCopyHint: Name, slogan, and narrative copy for the primary brand. Visual assets are managed in Brand kit.
brandKit.typographyRolesHint: Up to 2 fonts in the kit — accent (headings) and body (copy) for proposals, offers, and invoices.
brandKit.googleFontsHint: Added once and saved locally — no network calls at render time.
brandKit.systemFontsHint: Safe stacks available on most devices.
brandKit.fontUploadTooLarge: Font file is too large (max 2 MB).
brandKit.fontUploadFailed: Could not read this font file.
brandKit.manageVisualIdentityHint: Open Brand kit to manage visual identity for proposals and client documents.
brandKit.documentThemeHint: Primary kit visuals feed proposals, offers, and invoices.
brandKit.proposalThemeHint: Proposal decks use the primary brand kit below.
brandKit.offerThemeHint: Offer PDFs inherit logo, colours, and fonts from the primary kit.
brandKit.invoiceThemeHint: Invoice templates will use the primary brand kit.

sales.intro: Map service groups to catalogue lines, then attach works and reviews in one place (stored in this browser until workspace sync).

listToolbar.noResults: No items match your search or filters.

general.localOnlyHint: Stored in this browser for now. After leadership approves the data model, we will sync these fields to the workspace and wire proposals — no server calls yet.
general.logoHint: Shown on proposals and client-facing pages once wired to the backend.
general.headline: Header
general.headlinePlaceholder: Main title for proposals and client pages
general.subtitle: Subtitle
general.bannerHint: Hero strip behind the headline — image upload or a direct HTTPS video file.
general.bannerVideoHintDirect: Inline preview works for direct HTTPS links to MP4, WebM, or OGG. YouTube or Vimeo pages are not supported here.
general.companySectionBody: Use the same wording you want on PDF offers and contracts. These fields are not sent to the server yet.
general.registrationDetailsHint: Commercial register, court, managing directors — free text.
general.officeSectionHint: Public phone and email for § 5 TMG and client-facing footers — not the signatory block below.
general.supervisoryAuthorityHint: Trade supervisory body and licence wording (e.g. § 34c GewO real-estate broker).
general.professionalLiabilityInsuranceHint: Legal name and address of the insurer (Berufshaftpflicht).
general.insuranceCoverageScopeHint: What the policy covers (Geltungsbereich des Versicherungsschutzes).
general.visualizationCreditsHint: Credit line for Impressum or site footer, e.g. "Photo by MAXAR AG".
general.signingPrimaryHint: § 55 II RStV / authorised representatives (e.g. "Vorstand: Dr. …"). Also used on offer footers when set.
general.proposalDefaultsHint: Standard paragraphs for proposals and PDF conditions. Validity in days is set under the Offer tab. Adjust to your playbooks and save at the bottom.
general.proposalTabIntro: These blocks are used when a template still expects studio defaults (stored in this browser until workspace sync).
general.shareLinkDefaultsHint: Applies when you publish a proposal or offer and share the client link. Leave empty for no expiry.
general.defaultPaymentTermsPlaceholder: e.g. 50% on signed order, 40% at approved preview, 10% before final delivery — invoices net 14 days
general.defaultPaymentTermsHelp: Dropped into payment / milestone sections when the template leaves the slot empty.
general.defaultVatNotePlaceholder: e.g. All amounts net; VAT at the statutory rate on the invoice date unless a gross price is stated
general.defaultVatNoteHelp: Short tax / price disclaimer for footers and cover pages.
general.defaultRevisionsNotePlaceholder: e.g. Two consolidated revision rounds included; further changes quoted separately
general.defaultRevisionsNoteHelp: Clarifies rounds, scope of changes, and how you want feedback delivered.
general.advantagesHint: Short bullets or a paragraph — what makes you the right partner.
general.defaultProposalLocaleHint: Starting point for new proposal copy; templates can still override per document.
general.displayCurrencyHint: ISO 4217 code for prices in tables and exports (stored locally until workspace sync).
general.studioTimezoneHint: IANA zone for dates and deadlines shown to clients.
general.defaultEmailSignOffHint: Plain-text closings (e.g. "Best regards" + name). Separate from contract signatories on offers.
general.contactWebHint: Public site and main contact channels for proposals and footers.
general.brandProfilesHint: Add one or more brands (e.g. house vs sub-brand). Upload several logo files per brand and mark one as primary for exports.
general.brandTabIntro: Each card is one brand: logotypes first, then name, slogan, and rich text. Data stays in this browser until workspace sync.
general.defaultBrandHint: Used when a template expects a single studio identity.
general.singleBrandDefaultHint: With one brand profile, it is always treated as the default for proposals.
general.brandLogosHint: Compact previews — assign roles so templates know which asset to pick (only one primary per brand).
general.brandLogosEmpty: No logotypes yet. Add a row to upload a primary mark, wordmark, or variant.
general.invoicingPlaceholderBody: Bank details, invoice numbering, and tax lines will move here once the workspace model is defined.
general.offerTabHint: Default validity window when a template does not set days per send.
general.formFieldsSaveHint: Offices update immediately. Save at the bottom for all text fields, brands, and logos on this page.

offices.intro: Add every location you reference in pitches: physical studio, virtual seat, or registered legal address — with street, postal code, and optional local contact.
offices.confirmRemoveBody: The office card and its photos will be deleted from this browser. This cannot be undone.

photos.label: Office photos
photos.hint: Add a cover photo (16:9) and an optional secondary photo (3:4) for proposals and the dossier.

map.label: Map location
map.hint: Search for the address or click on the map to drop a pin. Drag the pin to fine-tune.
map.searchError: Could not reach the address service. Try again in a moment.

services.intro: Build a master list of deliverables, then optionally bundle them into groups (e.g. Exterior vs Interior) for segment-specific proposals. The same line item can appear in multiple groups.
services.localOnlyHint: Stored in this browser only until the data model is approved and synced — no server calls yet (same as General).
services.catalogBody: Every named service you might reference in proposals, dossiers, or pricing. Use optional fields for commercial hints; structured pricing comes with backend sync later.
services.catalogEmpty: No services yet. Add your first line item.
services.catalogOverviewHint: Click a chip to scroll to that line below. Drag handles reorder the full catalogue.
services.lineMediaHint: Shown on the service list and in proposals once wired.
services.catalogFillGuideTitle: How to fill this card (example: Interior Visualization)
services.catalogFillGuideIntro: Use the checklist below as a reference — replace every example with your real copy. Changes save automatically; no Done button.
services.catalogFillGuideAutosave: Every field saves to this browser as you type.
services.catalogFillGuideStepMedia: Media — upload an interior still (Image) or paste a short walkthrough URL (Video).
services.catalogFillGuideStepName: Name — e.g. Interior Visualization (the catalogue line title).
services.catalogFillGuideStepSummary: Short summary — one plain line for compact lists, e.g. Photorealistic interior renders for luxury retail.
services.catalogFillGuideStepCode: Code / SKU and typical duration — e.g. VIS-INT-01 · 2–4 weeks.
services.catalogFillGuideStepPricing: Price from / to and currency — commercial hints only until structured pricing syncs.
services.catalogFillGuideStepDescription: Description — full scope in rich text (deliverables, revisions, formats).
services.catalogFillGuideStepUrl: More info URL — optional link to a PDF or landing page.
services.catalogFillGuideStepWork: Linked portfolio work — optional case this service is showcased on (e.g. Luxury Beauty Center).
services.catalogFillGuideStepGroups: Relations → Service group — add the line to bundles such as Interior visualization (Groups tab). Tags on the list show Group · …
services.catalogFillGuideStepReviews: Relations → Reviews — link testimonials that mention this deliverable.
services.catalogFillGuideSummaryPlaceholder: e.g. Photorealistic interior renders for luxury spaces
services.lineSummaryHint: Plain text for compact lists and tables (optional).
services.lineDurationHint: Free text — e.g. lead time or delivery window.
services.lineCurrencyHint: ISO code for this line; leave empty to fall back to workspace default later.
services.linePriceUnitHint: Optional label after the amount — per image, per project, from, etc.
services.lineDescriptionHint: Full service page copy on the line card and in exports once wired.
services.pricingSectionHint: Each price is its own block. “New price” adds another block below.

pricingTier.name: Price name
pricingTier.descriptionHint: Scope, deliverables, and notes for this price tier.
pricingTier.descriptionPlaceholder: What is included, formats, revision policy…
pricingTier.priceAmountHint: Amount and currency in one field, e.g. 300 € or 1200 USD.
pricingTier.durationHint: Free text — e.g. less than a week.

services.catalogLineRelationsHint: Groups and reviews that already include this service are listed below. Remove with × or add more from the dropdown.
services.catalogLineLinkedReviewsEmpty: No reviews link this service yet.
services.catalogLineAddToGroupPlaceholder: Add this line to a group…
services.groupsEmpty: No groups yet. Create one when you want a named bundle.
services.groupMemberCount: {{count}} of {{total}} catalogue lines linked to this bundle
services.groupCardNoServices: No services in this bundle yet
services.confirmRemoveLineBody: It will disappear from all groups that reference it.
services.confirmRemoveGroupBody: The catalogue stays unchanged; only this bundle is removed.
services.groupPackageDescriptionHint: Sales pitch for the whole bundle — shown under the title on group cards, separate from each catalogue line.
services.collapsibleProfileDescription: Title, banner, and description shown on group cards.
services.collapsibleServicesDescription: Catalogue lines in this bundle — checkbox or row, same picker as Services tab.
services.groupEditorHint: Name the bundle and describe the pitch — separate from individual catalogue lines below.
services.groupOrderHint: Drag to change display order for proposals.

tools.empty: No production tools yet — add Unreal Engine, V-Ray, Corona, etc.
tools.confirmRemoveBody: Linked works will keep their other tools — only this one will be unlinked.

fields.name: Tool name
fields.summaryPlaceholder: One line shown on cards (160 chars).
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: How the studio uses this tool — version, plugins, notes.
fields.featuredHint: Surface this tool by default in 'tools we use' sections.

products.empty: No products yet — bundle catalogue lines into fixed-scope packages.
products.confirmRemoveBody: Catalogue lines and works stay — only this product bundle is removed.

fields.title: Product name
fields.summaryPlaceholder: One line shown on cards (160 chars).
fields.inclusionsPlaceholder: One bullet per line — e.g. 3 exterior renders @ 4K, 2 revision rounds, 5 working days.
fields.inclusionsHint: Lines render as bullets on the public product page.
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Full pitch shown on proposals and product page.
fields.featuredHint: Surface this package by default in 'featured products' sections.

playbooks.intro: Reusable call and email scripts for Sales — first touch, voicemail, objections. Assign a playbook on each prospect card.
playbooks.noBodyYet: No hook line yet — add a summary or opening.
playbooks.confirmRemoveBody: Prospects with this playbook assigned will show no script until you pick another one.
playbooks.name: Name
playbooks.namePlaceholder: e.g. MAXAR AG — first touch DE
playbooks.summaryHint: Shown on the list card instead of the full script. Keep it under 120 characters.
playbooks.summaryPlaceholder: e.g. First touch — premium viz capacity for developer programmes
playbooks.sectionsIntro: Use {{company}}, {{contact_name}}, {{your_name}} placeholders — they are not auto-filled yet; paste from the prospect card.

opening.label: Opening (10 sec)
opening.placeholder: Good morning {{contact_name}}, this is {{your_name}} from 2mb — do you have 30 seconds?

context.label: Context (why now)
context.hint: Trigger, project signal, or reason this week.

valueProp.label: Value proposition (30 sec)
valueProp.hint: One sentence on what 2mb delivers and for whom.
valueProp.placeholder: We produce exterior and interior visuals for residential developers…

discoveryQuestions.label: Discovery questions
discoveryQuestions.hint: One question per line — listen more than pitch.
discoveryQuestions.placeholder:
Which projects need visualization in the next 90 days?
Who signs off on external viz partners?

talkTrack.label: Talk track
talkTrack.hint: Bullets you can read during the call.
talkTrack.placeholder:
- Reference comparable cases
- Mention DE/UK delivery

objections.label: Objection handling
objections.placeholder: We already have a viz partner → …

voicemail.label: Voicemail (~30 sec)
voicemail.hint: Slow, clear; repeat name and number once.

followUpEmail.label: Follow-up email
followUpEmail.hint: Paste-ready subject + body after the call.

nextStep.label: Next step / CTA
nextStep.hint: Concrete ask before you hang up.
nextStep.placeholder: 15-min call Thursday to review one reference project?

segments.intro: Who each offer is for — architects, developers, interior designers, etc. Descriptions and banners help tailor proposals later.
segments.listRowCollapseHint: Banner, titles, and body for this segment.
segments.title: Title
segments.confirmRemoveBody: Linked reviews will be detached from this segment.
segments.linkedServicesEmptyCatalog: No catalogue lines yet — add one below; they link this segment to services and groups.

works.intro: Portfolio pieces you can surface in proposals — hero image, story, client, location, linked services, tags, and optional gallery.
works.listSectionDescription: Drag cards to reorder. Each preview shows hero, headline, client, location, story excerpt, timeline, and linked catalogue lines — open a card for full editing.
works.collapsibleContextDescription: Shown on the work list preview and in proposals once wired.
works.collapsibleServicesDescription: Link catalogue lines delivered on this project (checkbox or row). Up to {{max}}; same picker as Services → Groups.
works.collapsibleTaskDescription: Scope and deliverables for this case — rich text for proposals and the public site once wired.
works.collapsibleStoryDescription: Main narrative about the project — context, approach, and outcome. Fill this before task and timeline.
works.collapsibleTimelineDescription: How long the engagement took — e.g. weeks or months on site.
works.collapsibleReviewsDescription: Client quotes linked to this case. Create here or attach an existing testimonial.
works.editorFlowHint: Suggested order: hero → identity → client → story → task → timeline → services → reviews → gallery → links.
works.linkedReviewsEmpty: No reviews linked yet — add one below or pick from your library.
works.collapsibleHeroDescription: Main cover for this case — used in list previews and proposals once wired.
works.collapsiblePortfolioRowsDescription: Same editor as in proposals: rows, image and text cells, drag to reorder. Images stay in this browser as data URLs until workspace sync.
works.linkedServicesHint: Checkbox or row toggles the service for this project (highlighted = linked). Up to {{max}}; chips on the card. Add line creates a master-catalog entry everywhere. Drag handles reorder the catalogue when the filter is empty — same as Services → Groups.
works.linkedServicesEmptyCatalog: No catalogue lines yet — add one below; it appears in Services and all groups.
works.aggregateRatingHint: {{average}} out of 5 — average from {{count}} review(s) with a rating
works.aggregateRatingAria: Average rating {{average}} out of 5 from {{count}} reviews
works.confirmRemoveBody: This project card will be deleted from the local profile.

fields.title: Project title
fields.categoryHint: Shown as the small label above the title on the works list (e.g. COMPLEX). Matches 2mb.studio case categories.
fields.locationPlaceholder: e.g. Berlin, DE or Dubai, UAE
fields.tagsHint: Free labels for search or legacy copy — use catalogue links above for structured services on previews.
fields.bannerHint: Main visual on the project card, portfolio grid, and case-study header.
fields.descriptionHint: Long narrative on the project page and in proposal case-study blocks.
fields.taskBodyHint: Scope and deliverables — what you did for the client on this project.
fields.publicationStatusHint: Webflow-style visibility on the site and in exports once wired.

reviews.intro: Social proof blocks. Optionally tie a quote to a segment, portfolio cases, one service bundle, and catalogue lines so proposals pick the right context.
reviews.listRowCollapseHint: Photo or video, quote, rating, segment, portfolio links, bundle, and services.
reviews.author: Author
reviews.bodyHint: Quoted text on testimonial cards and in proposal social-proof blocks.
reviews.ratingHint: Shown on testimonial cards and in proposal social-proof blocks.
reviews.segmentLinkHint: Audience segment this quote targets in proposals.
reviews.collapsibleMediaDescription: Optional portrait for proposals and the reviews list — image or embed.
reviews.collapsibleQuoteDescription: Testimonial text, star rating, and primary audience segment.
reviews.collapsibleServicesDescription: Link catalogue lines this quote refers to (checkbox or row). Up to {{max}}.
reviews.collapsibleGroupsDescription: Optional single service bundle this quote is most associated with.
reviews.mediaModeAria: Photo or video for this testimonial
reviews.mediaVideoHint: Check the URL — inline preview works for YouTube, Vimeo, and direct HTTPS links to MP4, WebM, or OGG.
reviews.mediaClipSizeHint: Same size limit as images (~1.8 MB); long clips should use YouTube or Vimeo.
reviews.confirmRemoveBody: This testimonial will be removed from the local profile.
reviews.relationsHint: Link this quote to real work and services. Portfolio: multiple cases. Service bundle: pick at most one group. Catalogue: several lines as tags (add from the list, remove with ×).
reviews.linkedWorksHint: Select every project this client is quoted for — services from each case are added automatically (up to {{max}}).
reviews.linkedWorksEmptyCatalog: Add portfolio works under Best works first, then link them here.
reviews.linkedCatalogHint: Up to {{max}} catalogue lines; use chips to remove.

invoicing.bankAccountsDescription: Add the accounts you use for client payments. One is marked default and used by every invoice unless a template overrides it.
invoicing.bankAccountsHint: IBANs are validated locally (mod-97 checksum). Whitespace is stripped on save.
invoicing.bankAccountsEmpty: No bank accounts yet. Add the one you use most often.

ibanError.format: Only letters and digits are allowed.
ibanError.length: IBAN length is invalid for this country.
ibanError.checksum: IBAN checksum failed — check for typos.

invoicing.taxProfileDescription: Drives VAT rendering on invoices and the footer note shown on every issued document.
invoicing.defaultVatRateHint: Used when a line item has no explicit rate. Disabled outside Regular VAT mode.
invoicing.showTaxFooterNote: Show the tax-mode note on invoice footers
invoicing.kleinunternehmerNotePlaceholder: e.g. Gemäß § 19 UStG wird keine Umsatzsteuer berechnet.
invoicing.reverseChargeNotePlaceholder: e.g. Steuerschuldnerschaft des Leistungsempfängers gemäß § 13b UStG.
invoicing.invoiceNumberingDescription: Prefix + optional year + zero-padded counter. Counter advances when an invoice is issued.
invoicing.offerNumberingDescription: Separate counter for offers — keeps INV-… and OF-… ranges apart.
invoicing.paymentDefaultsDescription: Workspace defaults; templates and individual documents can still override per send.
invoicing.lateFeeNotePlaceholder: e.g. After the due date 9 % p.a. plus base rate applies
invoicing.leistungszeitraumHint: Drives how the service period prints on invoices.
invoicing.bankAccountNotFound: This bank account was not found.
invoicing.confirmRemoveBankAccountBody: Templates pointing at this bank will fall back to the workspace default.

bankAccountsToolbar.noResults: No bank accounts match this filter.

sections.title: Document sections library
sections.description: Reusable named blocks (Scope, Terms, Bank, Footer, Signatory). Templates compose sections by id — edit a section once, every template updates.
sections.hint: Use {{variable}} placeholders such as {{studio.signingName}} or {{bank.iban}} — they fill from the current workspace and selected bank.
sections.name: Section name
sections.bodyPlaceholder: Copy that will be inserted into the document.

templates.name: Name
templates.descriptionPlaceholder: Short note describing when to pick this template
templates.sectionsLabel: Sections in this template (toggle to add/remove)
templates.sectionsHint: Pick up to {{max}} sections — order in the document follows the workspace section library.
templates.noSectionsAvailable: No sections in the library yet — add at least one in Proposal or Offer.
templates.bankFieldHint: Override the workspace default bank for this template only.
templates.taxFieldHint: Force a tax mode for this template only.
templates.validityHint: Overrides the workspace offer validity for this template only.
templates.totalCapHint: Reached the workspace limit of {{max}} templates across all kinds.
templates.confirmRemoveBody: Documents already generated keep their content. Future documents will fall back to the default template of this kind.

offer.title: Offer templates
offer.description: Named offer presets you can apply in one click when generating a document.
offer.hint: Each template binds a default bank, tax mode, and ordered sections — minimum bookkeeping at send time.

proposal.title: Proposal templates
proposal.description: Named proposal presets for Sales — reused for deck composition and PDF export.
proposal.hint: Templates can ship with default validity and bank details so Sales only edits content, not boilerplate.

invoice.title: Invoice templates
invoice.description: Named invoice presets (Phase 3 — wired when the invoice entity ships).
invoice.hint: For now, the default bank, numbering, and tax mode apply automatically to every invoice.

workspaceOnboarding.title: Studio setup
workspaceOnboarding.subtitle: Define services, client segments, and how you pitch each combination. You can revise until everything is confirmed.
workspaceOnboarding.loadErrorHint: Companies and the rest of the app still work. Check your connection or try again.
workspaceOnboarding.unauthenticated: Sign in again to load and edit the studio catalogue.
workspaceOnboarding.saveError: Could not save. Check your connection and try again.
workspaceOnboarding.servicesHint: List what your studio sells. These power proposal templates and fit scoring.
workspaceOnboarding.segmentsHint: Who are your buyers? Prioritise segments you care about most.
workspaceOnboarding.matrixHint: Link a service to a segment and add an optional pitch line.
workspaceOnboarding.reviewIntro: You are about to save the catalogue used across proposals and mapping.

workspaceGate.title: Finish studio setup
workspaceGate.body: Add your services and segments so proposals and fit mapping use the right context. You can save a draft and come back anytime.
workspaceGate.statusErrorTitle: Could not check studio setup status
workspaceGate.statusErrorBody: The rest of the CRM still works. Retry or open Studio setup from Settings.

teamMember.subtitle: Assigned pipeline and recent touches on owned companies.
teamMember.emptyProspects: No companies assigned to this owner.
teamMember.forbidden: You cannot open this team profile.

dashboardSales.title: Your dashboard
dashboardSales.subtitle: Pipeline snapshot and recent touches.
dashboardSales.opsHint: Ops queues stay on the default dashboard for founder/ops.

folders.title: Folders
folders.confirmDelete: Delete this folder? Surveys inside will be moved to root.

companyProfile.officesHint: Company locations — used on offers and project correspondence.
companyProfile.officesEmpty: No offices yet. Add the HQ or site addresses for this company.
companyProfile.removeOfficeBody: This location will be deleted from the company record.
companyProfile.billingHint: Invoice and offer recipient — legal name, VAT ID, and billing address.

prospects.title: Companies

people.hint: Contacts at this company. Add as many as you need; call or email via the row menu.

playbook.label: Outreach playbook
playbook.emptyLibrary: No scripts in the library yet — create playbooks in Studio → Sales.
playbook.readerNone: No playbook assigned. Pick one under General, or browse the library.
playbook.readerEmptyBody: This playbook has no script text yet.

company.hint: Lead snapshot for outreach — saved with the dossier.
company.name: Company
company.projectPhasePlaceholder: e.g. PC filed, pre-launch, commercialisation soon
company.architectAgencyPlaceholder: Lead architect or design agency on the programme
company.visualObservationPlaceholder: Render quality, site materials, gaps vs. competitors…
company.empty: No company details yet. Open the Company tab in the left rail and tap the pencil to fill in.

prospects.emptyDesc: Companies appear here once accounts are added and triggers captured.
prospects.loadErrorHint: The request timed out. This usually clears up on a retry.

form.triggerPlaceholder: Tender published, leadership change, funding round, ...
form.duplicateWarning: An account that matches this name or website already exists. You can still add another company record for that account if intended.
form.duplicateBlocked: Confirm below to proceed — this will add a new company row for the matching account.
form.duplicateConfirm: Create company on this existing account
form.coaccessIntro: A colleague may already own this company. Request shared access instead of forcing a duplicate.

errors.create_failed: Could not create company. Please try again.
errors.unauthenticated: You need to sign in again.
errors.duplicate_account: This account already exists. Confirm to continue.

workspace.noContactsYet: No contacts yet — add them in the Dossier tab.
workspace.snapshotEmpty: No AI snapshot yet. Run enrichment or fill the dossier.
workspace.fitSubtitle: Derived from dossier sections — not a separate scoring engine.
workspace.meetingsPlaceholder: Calendar integration is not wired here yet — use Activity for logged touches.
workspace.relationshipsHint: Contacts on the account. Mark decision-makers in the Dossier (section 4).
workspace.proposalsEmpty: No proposals yet — create one from the editor.
workspace.offersEmpty: No offers yet — create one from the studio offer template.
workspace.quickNotePlaceholder: Scratch pad for this company — saves automatically…
workspace.quickNoteHint: Only visible on this card. For the timeline, use the Activity tab.
workspace.aiBody: A guided assistant for this company is not enabled yet. Use the dossier and activity tabs for now.
workspace.commsHint: Call via Easybell or compose in your IONOS mailbox (primary contact).
workspace.noPrimaryPhone: No phone on file for the primary contact.
workspace.emailHint: Opens your mail client with the primary contact email.
workspace.noPrimaryEmail: No email on file for the primary contact.
workspace.addressEmpty: No address captured yet — add it in the Company tab.
workspace.addressBillingHint: Billing details are not captured per company yet.
workspace.companyTabHint: Firmographics and positioning — saved with the dossier.
workspace.leftPrimaryAria: Pipeline stage, primary contact, enrichment, and dossier editor
workspace.leftSignalAria: Latest trigger from a lead source
workspace.checklistHint: Fix issues in the Dossier tab, then save. Mark ready stays on the dossier toolbar.
workspace.fitLoadError: Could not load studio catalogue for this company.
workspace.fitIntro: Services and work from your studio catalogue — use them to pitch this client.
workspace.fitPickHint: Pick the services and work to pitch this client. Saved automatically.
workspace.fitEmpty: Your studio catalogue is empty. Add services and works to pitch from here.
workspace.fitPortfolioHint: Pick comparable work — linked services are added automatically.
workspace.fitServicesManualHint: Use when there is no matching portfolio case yet.
workspace.fitWorksEmpty: No portfolio work in Studio yet.
workspace.fitServicesEmpty: No service lines in Studio yet.
workspace.qaHint: During a call: capture a buyer question and your answer (or a draft answer).

artifacts.title: Artifacts
artifacts.empty: Save screenshots, links and notes from your site review.
artifacts.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Flat lighting, wrong materials on the facade…
artifacts.invalidLink: Enter a valid link (e.g. example.com or https://…).
artifacts.deleteConfirm: Delete this? Folders remove everything inside.

deals.title: Deals
deals.empty: No deals recorded for this company yet.

proposals.createFailed: Could not create proposal. Check workspace access and try again.
proposals.studioTemplateHint: Blocks, terms, bank details and pricing seed come from Studio settings → Offer / Proposal templates.
proposals.builderHint: Drag blocks by the handle to reorder. The preview updates after you save the draft.

serviceTags.addCustom: Add custom tag from search box

visualGrid.saveProposalFirst: Save the proposal first, then you can upload images.

video.urlPlaceholder: HTTPS link to MP4 / WebM (e.g. signed URL)
video.invalidUrl: Could not use this video URL in the preview
video.placeholder: Add a video link or upload a file

imageComparison.needBoth: Add both images to enable comparison

proposals.yourProposalsHint: Select a deck to edit. Rename or remove templates you no longer need.
proposals.empty: No proposals yet — create one above.
proposals.publishAdvanceStage: Advance company stage to Proposal sent
proposals.unpublishFailed: Could not move proposal to draft
proposals.publishFailed: Could not publish — complete required fields in the editor
proposals.shareLinkUnavailable: Client link is only available for published proposals

offers.studioTemplateHint: Template from Studio settings → Offer. Bank placeholders and catalog pricing resolve on create.
offers.createFromTemplateHint: Uses the default offer template from Studio settings → Offer.
offers.yourProposalsHint: Select an offer to edit. Publish to share a client link or PDF.
offers.empty: No offers yet — create one above.
offers.createFailed: Could not create offer. Check workspace access and try again.
offers.unpublishFailed: Could not move offer to draft
offers.publishFailed: Could not publish — complete required fields in the editor
offers.shareLinkUnavailable: Client link is only available for published offers

errors.requiresDossierReady: Dossier must be marked Ready before moving to this stage.
errors.backwardsForbidden: Only Ops or Admin can move companies backwards.
errors.invalidTransition: This stage transition is not allowed.

surveyDetail.noSurveySelected: Select a survey from the list
surveyDetail.noSurveySelectedDesc: Choose a survey to view its details, responses, and settings.
surveyDetail.noSurveysDesc: Create your first survey to get started.
surveyDetail.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this survey? This action cannot be undone.
surveyDetail.confirmArchive: Archive this survey? It will stop accepting new responses.

access.title: Access Control
access.subtitle: Manage who can access this survey
access.allMembersDesc: Everyone in the workspace can access this survey
access.selectedMembersDesc: Only chosen members can access this survey

surveyWidget.title: Widget & Sharing
surveyWidget.subtitle: Share your survey or embed it on your website
surveyWidget.directLinkDesc: Share this link or open in a new tab
surveyWidget.embedCodeDesc: Paste this into your website. The widget fills its parent container (set width/height on the parent).
surveyWidget.publishedVersionsDesc: Each publish creates a version. The link is the same for all versions; the latest is live.

home.title: Dashboard
home.subtitle: Overview of your surveys and leads
home.welcomeSubtitle: Here's what's happening with your surveys
home.noRecentResponses: No recent responses yet. Publish a survey to start collecting data.
home.noRecentLeads: No leads yet. Enable lead tracking in survey settings.
home.noSurveysYet: Welcome! Create your first survey to get started.

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Manage CRM seats, roles, and territories.
team.pageSubtitle: Invite teammates, assign CRM roles, and control which companies each seat can access.
team.inviteHint: Send an email invitation. The invitee sets a password and lands in the CRM with the role you pick here.
team.name: Name
team.noMembers: No members yet. Invite someone to get started.
team.confirmRemoveMessage: Cancel the pending invite for {{name}}? They won't be able to use their invite link.
team.confirmDeactivateMessage: {{name}} will lose access immediately. Their existing audit log entries stay intact.
team.confirmReactivateMessage: {{name}} will be able to log in again with the same password.
team.cannotDeactivateLastFounder: You cannot deactivate the last founder.
team.cannotChangeOwnRole: You cannot change your own role.
team.founderRequired: Only founders can perform this action.
team.founderDesc: Full control. Manages every seat, every company, and platform settings.
team.opsDesc: Triages companies, assigns owners across DE and UK, and runs the dossier pipeline.
team.sales_deDesc: Works DE-territory companies from dossier_ready onward. Cannot manage other seats.
team.sales_ukDesc: Works UK-territory companies from dossier_ready onward. Cannot manage other seats.
team.adminDesc: Read-only platform admin: views every seat and company for support and audits, cannot mutate.
team.territoryHelp: Required for sales seats; ignored for founder/ops/admin.

acceptInvite.title: Welcome to 2MB CRM
acceptInvite.subtitle: Set a password for {{email}} to finish setting up your seat.
acceptInvite.passwordHint: Use at least 12 characters with a mix of letters, numbers, and symbols.

auth.registerPitchTitle: Ops research and Sales outreach in one workspace
auth.registerPitch1Body: Kanban, filters, and stage rules that match how 2mb qualifies developer and architecture leads.
auth.registerPitch2Body: Structured research, comparable cases, and handoff-ready context instead of scattered notes.
auth.registerPitch3Body: Build commercial decks per account, publish a client link, and keep versions next to the deal record.
auth.loginHeroBody: Sign in to triage companies, finish dossiers, and manage commercial proposals for your territories.
auth.loginHeroCaption: 2mb — CGI, film, and spatial for real estate and architecture.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create your studio workspace, then complete Studio setup.
auth.studioNameRequired: Enter your studio or company name
auth.provisionFailed: Account created but workspace setup failed. Sign in and try again from Settings, or contact support.
auth.registerStep1Subtitle: We'll use it to create your account
auth.registerStep2Subtitle: Choose a strong password to secure your account
auth.passwordWeak: Use at least 8 characters, one uppercase, one lowercase, and one number
auth.newsletterLabel: Subscribe to product news and marketing emails
auth.registerConsentPrefix: By clicking Create account, you agree to the
auth.changeEmailHint: Use the arrow to go back and edit your email.
auth.agreeRequired: You must accept the privacy policy and terms to continue
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.resetSentDesc: We sent a password reset link to {{email}}
auth.checkEmailDesc: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}
auth.mockConfirmHint: In production, you would click the link in your email
auth.emailConfirmedDesc: Your account is ready. Redirecting to dashboard...
auth.confirmFailedDesc: The confirmation link may be expired or invalid
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Pick a strong password you have not used before
auth.passwordUpdatedDesc: You can now sign in with your new password

errors.userExists: A user with this email already exists
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests, try again in a minute

proposalsHub.title: Proposals
proposalsHub.subtitle: All commercial proposals visible to your seat — open the builder on the linked company.
proposalsHub.loadError: Could not load proposals. Try again.
proposalsHub.emptyBody: Create a proposal from a company workspace (Proposals tab).

offersHub.title: Offers
offersHub.subtitle: All commercial offers visible to your seat — open the editor on the linked company.
offersHub.loadError: Could not load offers. Try again.
offersHub.emptyBody: Create an offer from a company workspace (Offers tab) or Studio settings → Offer templates.

dossier.readyHint: This dossier is marked Ready. Reopen it for revisions if needed.

enrichmentProvenance.title: Latest enrichment
enrichmentProvenance.snapshotHint: Section 1 may mix CRM account data and provider output; override fields as needed after review.

ai.success: AI draft saved as a new version.

markReadyHint.qualityPending: Some checks need data we don't have yet — fill the missing sections to unblock.

errors.mark_ready_failed: Could not mark this dossier as ready.
errors.dossier_missing: Create and save the dossier first.
errors.already_ready: This dossier is already marked Ready.
errors.not_ready: Only ready dossiers can be reopened.
errors.stage_advanced: The company already moved past Dossier Ready — cannot reopen.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission for this action.

checks.recent_signal: Section 3 has a recent signal (≤180 days, with source URL)
checks.contact_method: Section 4 has at least one contact with email or LinkedIn
checks.hooks_3_meaningful: Section 7 has 3 unique hooks of ≥20 characters
checks.cases_complete: Section 8 has 3 case slots with name + why filled
checks.grounded_urls: All source URLs are traceable to enrichment/grounding (no stray links)

failures.no_recent_signal: No signal with a source URL within the last 180 days.
failures.no_contact_method: No contact has email or LinkedIn yet.
failures.no_contact_method_pending: Add a decision-maker contact with email or LinkedIn before marking ready.
failures.hooks_count_or_length: Need exactly 3 unique hooks, each at least 20 characters.
failures.cases_incomplete: All 3 case slots need both name and why.
failures.ungrounded_urls: One or more URLs in the dossier are not supported by the current enrichment snapshot.

versions.title: Version history
versions.empty: No versions yet — save the dossier to create the first one.

snapshot.label: Company snapshot
snapshot.help: Legal form, HQ, size, founded year — the surface facts.

what_they_do.label: What they do
what_they_do.help: One-paragraph overview, segments served, flagship offering.

fields.segmentsHint: Press Enter or comma to add a segment.

signals.label: Recent signals
signals.help: Why now? Funding, leadership change, tender, expansion. With source URL and date.
signals.empty: No signals yet — add at least one with a source URL within 180 days.

decision_makers.label: Decision-makers
decision_makers.help: Names, roles, and contact methods for the people who say yes.
decision_makers.selectionHint_one: {{count}} contact flagged as decision-maker for this dossier.
decision_makers.selectionHint_few: {{count}} contacts flagged as decision-makers for this dossier.
decision_makers.selectionHint_many: {{count}} contacts flagged as decision-makers for this dossier.
decision_makers.selectionHint_other: {{count}} contacts flagged as decision-makers for this dossier.

tech_clues.label: Tech & process clues
tech_clues.help: Visible tooling, vendors mentioned in case studies, careers stack hints.

competitive.label: Competitive context
competitive.help: Current vendors and in-house team posture.

hooks.label: Hooks for outreach
hooks.help: Three sharp angles ops can hand to sales as opener material.
hooks.guidance: Each hook should reference a real signal or case-study angle. ≥20 characters.

fields.tooShort: Hook is too short — write something concrete.

cases.label: Comparable 2mb cases
cases.help: Three of our cases that look like this company, with the 'why this resonates' note.
cases.guidance: Phase 6 will replace this with vector-search-picked cases. For now, hand-pick.

risks.label: Risks & blockers
risks.help: Known objections, conflicts, or red flags that sales should know upfront.

next_step.label: Suggested next step
next_step.help: How sales should approach. Channel + brief notes.

contacts.empty: No contacts yet. Add at least one with email or LinkedIn.

comms.invalidPhone: Enter a valid phone number first.
comms.invalidEmail: Enter a valid email address first.

activities.empty: No activity logged yet. Use the composer to add the first note.

composer.subject: Subject
composer.readOnlyHint: You don't have permission to log activities for this company.

placeholder.note: What happened? Decisions, blockers, anything sales should know.
placeholder.email: Sent an outreach email — what was the angle and what's next?
placeholder.linkedin: Sent a LinkedIn message — what was the hook?

errors.duplicate_contact: You already logged this activity type for this contact in the last 24 hours.

tasks.empty: No tasks yet. Create the first one to keep follow-ups on track.

fields.title: Title
fields.titlePlaceholder: Prepare the slide deck for the kickoff
fields.dueHint: Local time. Leave empty for open-ended.

clientProjects.title: Projects
clientProjects.intro: A project is the commercial unit for this company — attach offers here; after acceptance it moves into delivery.
clientProjects.empty: No projects yet. Create one before sending an offer.
clientProjects.acceptSuccess: Offer accepted — project is in delivery.
clientProjects.acceptNotPublished: Publish the offer before accepting it.

meetings.hint: Schedule discovery calls and follow-ups. The nearest upcoming meeting or open task appears in the header.
meetings.hintProspect: Meetings on this prospect only. Your workspace calendar shows entries assigned to you.
meetings.empty: No meetings yet. Add one to keep the next touch visible.
meetings.deleteConfirmBody: This removes the meeting from the prospect timeline. This cannot be undone.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Your scheduled touchpoints. By default only meetings assigned to you or that you organised are shown.
